TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Sowal_no_Pangcah, title = Sowal_no_Pangcah, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sowal_no_Pangcah} }

S.FORM: O sowal no Pangcah/ O sowal no 'Amis, Pangcah ato 'Amis malecaday to. O Sowal no Pangcah hananay i, o Pangcah a sowal. Ira ko 'alomanay to tamdaw a Pangcah i Taywan. Tangasa to i 2015 a mihcaan i, ira to ko 108200 a tamdaw somowalay to Sowal no Pangcah i hkal ma^min. Finacadan a sowal 族語 Yo hofoc saho kako, o matengilay no mako a ngiha o sowal no ina, aniniay a wawa i, o sowal nangra maemin to o no holam ko sowal, caay to pisano'Amis to sowal no ina, saka, lahedaw lahedaw sato ko caciyaw no 'Amis. O sowal no 'Amis anini matiya o mamalahedaw to, ano caho ka pisano 'Amis ko wawa ita i, o mamalahedaw to ko sowal no 'Amis, nawhani, to'as to'as sato ko mato'asay, o mamisiayaayaw aca tonika mamalahedaw ko sowal no 'Amis. Saka ira ko pinapina ko niharatengan no mako to palowad to sowal no 'Amis. I kiwkay micikeroh to sowal no finacadan 族語在教會推動 Matatahic ato kiwkay a palowad to parana'an a pinanaman to sowal iayaw i, tayni i Taywan mipatenakay to sowal no Pangcah a mipatenakay to Yincomin, pakayni toni Roma a tilid, mitilid to tilid no Yincomin, ta coyaken ningra ko fangcalay codad a misano 'Amis, tahamatini, 'aloman ho ko i niyro'ay a kiwkay ira ho ko no 'Amisay a fangcalay codad. Tadalimela ko i niyaro'ay a kiwkay palowad to sowal no kasafinacadan a sowal, anini sato mafalic to ko kasamihecaan, lasawad lasawad sato ko malitengay, o aniniay sato a kaemangay, awa:ay to ko faloco' nangra a sapinananam to sowal no 'Amis, mahapingan no mita ko anini ko kiwkay, ca:ay to ka caciyaw to no Pangcah a sowal, saka to nanay mipalowad koya mipatenakay a foksi, kalalok a pasifana' to sowal, to marayray ko sowal no mita o Pangcah. I kiwkay i, o kasasowalan no 'Amis to sowal no 'Amis a kaitiraan, o sa'opo no kiwkay malo kasasowalan to sowal no 'Amis. i kiwkay i manga'ay a malo pitengilan, kasasowalan a kaitiraan. Matiya o pitengil to kimad, pinanaman no wawa, kasa'opoan no mato'asay, mae^min sa a misano 'Amis, Ano misa'osi to Sesiw, minanam to radiw, sa^heto han misano 'Amis, ano samihecamiheca han a minanam, caka tongal tongal sato ko fana' a misano 'Amis. Saka, manga'ay a matatahic to kiwkay a minanam to sowal no 'Amis. i loma' a misatapang a pasifana' to sowal 家庭開始做起 O nanay no faloco' i, nanay o pinanaman i loma' ito, caay to ka ipapotal, nawhani, aniniay minanamay tona sowal saheto o ka^mangay a wawa, O pinanam i, deng aca i mitilidan, tahira sato i loma' ono kawping to ko sowal nangra, ano tayra ko singsi i parod no loma' pasifana' to sowal i, polong no paro no loma' ma^emin minanam to sowal no 'Amis, o akong, o ama, o mama, o ina ato wawa, pakafana'en ko polong no paro no loma' a tamdaw, kacifaloco' a palowad miparayray to sowal no 'Amis, o tadamanay a demakan ko nini , kasomowal to no 'Amis i loma' ko niyah, pa'icelen ko wawa i loma' ato i niyaro' a misano 'Amis. o pinanam to sowal a kaitiraan.語言巢 Mafana' kita to nika ratar no Mawlico hananay a tamdaw, misaicel a mipalowad to "pinanaman". Ci faloco' cangra a palowad to pinanam no wawa i ayaw no picomod to pitilid i, misatapang to a pasifana' to sowal nangra, tada makapah ko heci nangra a pasifana' to wawa. Pakay ni i loma' ato yociing a miliayaw to pitilidan ko pasifana' to wawa i, malaheci to nangra ko makapahay a pinanam. Aniani i Taywan misaicel to a mipatireng to"pinanaman to sowal a kaitiraan" maaraw no mita malaheci to a mapalawad kona demak. Itini tona pinanaman i, nanay o pasifana' to wawa manga'ay ko mato'asay a minanam. O aniniay a ina ato mama, caay to kasomowal to no 'Amis, pakaso^lin kita ano malacecay ko pinanam no ina no mama ato wawa i, O wawa wawa to no mita, ano i cowacowa to, i pitilidan to, i kiwkay to, i loma' manga'ay to macacawi to mato'asay a misano 'Amis. o singsi ato minanamay 師徒制 Ono mato'asay a micodad, o singsi aca ato cecay aca ko minanamay, anca o masaopaay minanamay, i laday no 'orip anca o demak no serangawan a minanm to sowal no Pangcah. O matiniay a pinanam, manga'ay patakaraw ko sapinanaman ato ci'icel ko minanamay a mato'asy, manga'ay marayray ko sowal to fana' ato tangen. Sakipapotal pinanaman no ka'emangay to sowal 校外的兒童族語課程 O papotalay no pitilidan ko nihaenan, tinako syako, niyaro', safelawan, kiwkay, midemak to sakisowal no niyah pinanam ato pikihatiyah, malo sakaira no ka'emangay kasasipiini ato minaman niyah a sowal. Matiniay a pipalalan matongal ko kafana'an no ka'emangay minanam to sowal, macikeroh ko laloma'an ato syakay mikihatiya picokeran. paherek a sowal 結語 Palacecayen ko loma', niyaro, kiwkay ato masamaanay a kasaopoan a malacecay mipalowad to sowal no Amis, patirengen no mita ko pitengilan, kasasowalan, pisaosian, pitilidan a kaitiraan. Minanam to sowal, ira aca kasasowalan to sowal, ano caka somowal caay to kananam a caciyaw to no Pangcah, mangalef caay katanestes ko sowal.
S.PHON: o~u so~uwaɾ no~u paŋʦaħ/ o~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis, paŋʦaħ ato~u ʡamis maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj to~u. o~u so~uwaɾ no~u paŋʦaħ ħananaj i, o~u paŋʦaħ a so~uwaɾ. ira ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw a paŋʦaħ i tajwan. taŋasa to~u i **** a miħʦaan i, ira to~u ko~u ****** a tamɬ~ɮaw so~umo~uwaɾaj to~u so~uwaɾ no~u paŋʦaħ i ħkaɾ maʔmin. finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ ** jo~u ħo~ufo~uʦ saħo~u kako~u, o~u matəŋiɾaj no~u mako~u a ŋiħa o~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina, aniniaj a wawa i, o~u so~uwaɾ naŋra maəmin to~u o~u no~u ħo~uɾam ko~u so~uwaɾ, ʦaaj to~u pisano~uʡamis to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina, saka, ɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ɾaħəɬ~ɮaw sato~u ko~u ʦaʦijaw no~u ʡamis. o~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis anini matija o~u mamaɾaħəɬ~ɮaw to~u, ano~u ʦaħo~u ka pisano~u ʡamis ko~u wawa ita i, o~u mamaɾaħəɬ~ɮaw to~u ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis, nawħani, to~uʡas to~uʡas sato~u ko~u mato~uʡasaj, o~u mamisiajaajaw aʦa to~unika mamaɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis. saka ira ko~u pinapina ko~u niħaratəŋan no~u mako~u to~u paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis. i kiwkaj miʦikəro~uħ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ******* matataħiʦ ato~u kiwkaj a paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u paranaʡan a pinanaman to~u so~uwaɾ iajaw i, tajni i tajwan mipatənakaj to~u so~uwaɾ no~u paŋʦaħ a mipatənakaj to~u jinʦo~umin, pakajni to~uni ro~uma a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u jinʦo~umin, ta ʦo~ujakən niŋra ko~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ a misano~u ʡamis, taħamatini, ʡaɾo~uman ħo~u ko~u i nijro~uʡaj a kiwkaj ira ħo~u ko~u no~u ʡamisaj a faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ. taɬ~ɮaɾiməɾa ko~u i nijaro~uʡaj a kiwkaj paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ, anini sato~u mafaɾiʦ to~u ko~u kasamiħəʦaan, ɾasawaɬ~ɮ ɾasawaɬ~ɮ sato~u ko~u maɾitəŋaj, o~u aniniaj sato~u a kaəmaŋaj, awa:aj to~u ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ naŋra a sapinananam to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis, maħapiŋan no~u mita ko~u anini ko~u kiwkaj, ʦa:aj to~u ka ʦaʦijaw to~u no~u paŋʦaħ a so~uwaɾ, saka to~u nanaj mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~uja mipatənakaj a fo~uksi, kaɾaɾo~uk a pasifanaʡ to~u so~uwaɾ, to~u marajraj ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u mita o~u paŋʦaħ. i kiwkaj i, o~u kasaso~uwaɾan no~u ʡamis to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis a kaitiraan, o~u saʡo~upo~u no~u kiwkaj maɾo~u kasaso~uwaɾan to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis. i kiwkaj i maŋaʡaj a maɾo~u pitəŋiɾan, kasaso~uwaɾan a kaitiraan. matija o~u pitəŋiɾ to~u kimaɬ~ɮ, pinanaman no~u wawa, kasaʡo~upo~uan no~u mato~uʡasaj, maəʔmin sa a misano~u ʡamis, ano~u misaʡo~usi to~u səsiw, minanam to~u raɬ~ɮiw, saʔħəto~u ħan misano~u ʡamis, ano~u samiħəʦamiħəʦa ħan a minanam, ʦaka to~uŋaɾ to~uŋaɾ sato~u ko~u fanaʡ a misano~u ʡamis. saka, maŋaʡaj a matataħiʦ to~u kiwkaj a minanam to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis. i ɾo~umaʡ a misatapaŋ a pasifanaʡ to~u so~uwaɾ ****** o~u nanaj no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ i, nanaj o~u pinanaman i ɾo~umaʡ ito~u, ʦaaj to~u ka ipapo~utaɾ, nawħani, aniniaj minanamaj to~una so~uwaɾ saħəto~u o~u kaʔmaŋaj a wawa, o~u pinanam i, ɬ~ɮəŋ aʦa i mitiɾiɬ~ɮan, taħira sato~u i ɾo~umaʡ o~uno~u kawpiŋ to~u ko~u so~uwaɾ naŋra, ano~u tajra ko~u siŋsi i paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ pasifanaʡ to~u so~uwaɾ i, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ maʔəmin minanam to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis, o~u ako~uŋ, o~u ama, o~u mama, o~u ina ato~u wawa, pakafanaʡən ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw, kaʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡ a paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ miparajraj to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis, o~u taɬ~ɮamanaj a ɬ~ɮəmakan ko~u nini , kaso~umo~uwaɾ to~u no~u ʡamis i ɾo~umaʡ ko~u nijaħ, paʡiʦəɾən ko~u wawa i ɾo~umaʡ ato~u i nijaro~uʡ a misano~u ʡamis. o~u pinanam to~u so~uwaɾ a kaitiraan.*** mafanaʡ kita to~u nika ratar no~u mawɾiʦo~u ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, misaiʦəɾ a mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u "pinanaman". ʦi faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ʦaŋra a paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u pinanam no~u wawa i ajaw no~u piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ i, misatapaŋ to~u a pasifanaʡ to~u so~uwaɾ naŋra, taɬ~ɮa makapaħ ko~u ħəʦi naŋra a pasifanaʡ to~u wawa. pakaj ni i ɾo~umaʡ ato~u jo~uʦiiŋ a miɾiajaw to~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan ko~u pasifanaʡ to~u wawa i, maɾaħəʦi to~u naŋra ko~u makapaħaj a pinanam. aniani i tajwan misaiʦəɾ to~u a mipatirəŋ to~u"pinanaman to~u so~uwaɾ a kaitiraan" maaraw no~u mita maɾaħəʦi to~u a mapaɾawaɬ~ɮ ko~una ɬ~ɮəmak. itini to~una pinanaman i, nanaj o~u pasifanaʡ to~u wawa maŋaʡaj ko~u mato~uʡasaj a minanam. o~u aniniaj a ina ato~u mama, ʦaaj to~u kaso~umo~uwaɾ to~u no~u ʡamis, pakaso~uʔɾin kita ano~u maɾaʦəʦaj ko~u pinanam no~u ina no~u mama ato~u wawa i, o~u wawa wawa to~u no~u mita, ano~u i ʦo~uwaʦo~uwa to~u, i pitiɾiɬ~ɮan to~u, i kiwkaj to~u, i ɾo~umaʡ maŋaʡaj to~u maʦaʦawi to~u mato~uʡasaj a misano~u ʡamis. o~u siŋsi ato~u minanamaj *** o~uno~u mato~uʡasaj a miʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, o~u siŋsi aʦa ato~u ʦəʦaj aʦa ko~u minanamaj, anʦa o~u masao~upaaj minanamaj, i ɾaɬ~ɮaj no~u ʡo~urip anʦa o~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u səraŋawan a minanm to~u so~uwaɾ no~u paŋʦaħ. o~u matiniaj a pinanam, maŋaʡaj patakaraw ko~u sapinanaman ato~u ʦiʡiʦəɾ ko~u minanamaj a mato~uʡasj, maŋaʡaj marajraj ko~u so~uwaɾ to~u fanaʡ ato~u taŋən. sakipapo~utaɾ pinanaman no~u kaʡəmaŋaj to~u so~uwaɾ ********* o~u papo~utaɾaj no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan ko~u niħaənan, tinako~u sjako~u, nijaro~uʡ, safəɾawan, kiwkaj, miɬ~ɮəmak to~u sakiso~uwaɾ no~u nijaħ pinanam ato~u pikiħatijaħ, maɾo~u sakaira no~u kaʡəmaŋaj kasasipiini ato~u minaman nijaħ a so~uwaɾ. matiniaj a pipaɾaɾan mato~uŋaɾ ko~u kafanaʡan no~u kaʡəmaŋaj minanam to~u so~uwaɾ, maʦikəro~uħ ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan ato~u sjakaj mikiħatija piʦo~ukəran. paħərək a so~uwaɾ ** paɾaʦəʦajən ko~u ɾo~umaʡ, nijaro~u, kiwkaj ato~u masamaanaj a kasao~upo~uan a maɾaʦəʦaj mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u amis, patirəŋən no~u mita ko~u pitəŋiɾan, kasaso~uwaɾan, pisao~usian, pitiɾiɬ~ɮan a kaitiraan. minanam to~u so~uwaɾ, ira aʦa kasaso~uwaɾan to~u so~uwaɾ, ano~u ʦaka so~umo~uwaɾ ʦaaj to~u kananam a ʦaʦijaw to~u no~u paŋʦaħ, maŋaɾəf ʦaaj katanəstəs ko~u so~uwaɾ.
S.FORM: O sowal no Pangcah/ O sowal no 'Amis, Pangcah ato 'Amis malecaday to. O Sowal no Pangcah hananay i, o Pangcah a sowal. Ira ko 'alomanay to tamdaw a Pangcah i Taywan. Tangasa to i 2015 a mihcaan i, ira to ko 108200 a tamdaw somowalay to Sowal no Pangcah i hkal ma^min. Finacadan a sowal 族語 Yo hofoc saho kako, o matengilay no mako a ngiha o sowal no ina, aniniay a wawa i, o sowal nangra maemin to o no holam ko sowal, caay to pisano'Amis to sowal no ina, saka, lahedaw lahedaw sato ko caciyaw no 'Amis. O sowal no 'Amis anini matiya o mamalahedaw to, ano caho ka pisano 'Amis ko wawa ita i, o mamalahedaw to ko sowal no 'Amis, nawhani, to'as to'as sato ko mato'asay, o mamisiayaayaw aca tonika mamalahedaw ko sowal no 'Amis. Saka ira ko pinapina ko niharatengan no mako to palowad to sowal no 'Amis. I kiwkay micikeroh to sowal no finacadan 族語在教會推動 Matatahic ato kiwkay a palowad to parana'an a pinanaman to sowal iayaw i, tayni i Taywan mipatenakay to sowal no Pangcah a mipatenakay to Yincomin, pakayni toni Roma a tilid, mitilid to tilid no Yincomin, ta coyaken ningra ko fangcalay codad a misano 'Amis, tahamatini, 'aloman ho ko i niyro'ay a kiwkay ira ho ko no 'Amisay a fangcalay codad. Tadalimela ko i niyaro'ay a kiwkay palowad to sowal no kasafinacadan a sowal, anini sato mafalic to ko kasamihecaan, lasawad lasawad sato ko malitengay, o aniniay sato a kaemangay, awa:ay to ko faloco' nangra a sapinananam to sowal no 'Amis, mahapingan no mita ko anini ko kiwkay, ca:ay to ka caciyaw to no Pangcah a sowal, saka to nanay mipalowad koya mipatenakay a foksi, kalalok a pasifana' to sowal, to marayray ko sowal no mita o Pangcah. I kiwkay i, o kasasowalan no 'Amis to sowal no 'Amis a kaitiraan, o sa'opo no kiwkay malo kasasowalan to sowal no 'Amis. i kiwkay i manga'ay a malo pitengilan, kasasowalan a kaitiraan. Matiya o pitengil to kimad, pinanaman no wawa, kasa'opoan no mato'asay, mae^min sa a misano 'Amis, Ano misa'osi to Sesiw, minanam to radiw, sa^heto han misano 'Amis, ano samihecamiheca han a minanam, caka tongal tongal sato ko fana' a misano 'Amis. Saka, manga'ay a matatahic to kiwkay a minanam to sowal no 'Amis. i loma' a misatapang a pasifana' to sowal 家庭開始做起 O nanay no faloco' i, nanay o pinanaman i loma' ito, caay to ka ipapotal, nawhani, aniniay minanamay tona sowal saheto o ka^mangay a wawa, O pinanam i, deng aca i mitilidan, tahira sato i loma' ono kawping to ko sowal nangra, ano tayra ko singsi i parod no loma' pasifana' to sowal i, polong no paro no loma' ma^emin minanam to sowal no 'Amis, o akong, o ama, o mama, o ina ato wawa, pakafana'en ko polong no paro no loma' a tamdaw, kacifaloco' a palowad miparayray to sowal no 'Amis, o tadamanay a demakan ko nini , kasomowal to no 'Amis i loma' ko niyah, pa'icelen ko wawa i loma' ato i niyaro' a misano 'Amis. o pinanam to sowal a kaitiraan.語言巢 Mafana' kita to nika ratar no Mawlico hananay a tamdaw, misaicel a mipalowad to "pinanaman". Ci faloco' cangra a palowad to pinanam no wawa i ayaw no picomod to pitilid i, misatapang to a pasifana' to sowal nangra, tada makapah ko heci nangra a pasifana' to wawa. Pakay ni i loma' ato yociing a miliayaw to pitilidan ko pasifana' to wawa i, malaheci to nangra ko makapahay a pinanam. Aniani i Taywan misaicel to a mipatireng to"pinanaman to sowal a kaitiraan" maaraw no mita malaheci to a mapalawad kona demak. Itini tona pinanaman i, nanay o pasifana' to wawa manga'ay ko mato'asay a minanam. O aniniay a ina ato mama, caay to kasomowal to no 'Amis, pakaso^lin kita ano malacecay ko pinanam no ina no mama ato wawa i, O wawa wawa to no mita, ano i cowacowa to, i pitilidan to, i kiwkay to, i loma' manga'ay to macacawi to mato'asay a misano 'Amis. o singsi ato minanamay 師徒制 Ono mato'asay a micodad, o singsi aca ato cecay aca ko minanamay, anca o masaopaay minanamay, i laday no 'orip anca o demak no serangawan a minanm to sowal no Pangcah. O matiniay a pinanam, manga'ay patakaraw ko sapinanaman ato ci'icel ko minanamay a mato'asy, manga'ay marayray ko sowal to fana' ato tangen. Sakipapotal pinanaman no ka'emangay to sowal 校外的兒童族語課程 O papotalay no pitilidan ko nihaenan, tinako syako, niyaro', safelawan, kiwkay, midemak to sakisowal no niyah pinanam ato pikihatiyah, malo sakaira no ka'emangay kasasipiini ato minaman niyah a sowal. Matiniay a pipalalan matongal ko kafana'an no ka'emangay minanam to sowal, macikeroh ko laloma'an ato syakay mikihatiya picokeran. paherek a sowal 結語 Palacecayen ko loma', niyaro, kiwkay ato masamaanay a kasaopoan a malacecay mipalowad to sowal no Amis, patirengen no mita ko pitengilan, kasasowalan, pisaosian, pitilidan a kaitiraan. Minanam to sowal, ira aca kasasowalan to sowal, ano caka somowal caay to kananam a caciyaw to no Pangcah, mangalef caay katanestes ko sowal.
S.PHON: o~u so~uwaɾ no~u paŋʦaħ/ o~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis, paŋʦaħ ato~u ʡamis maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj to~u. o~u so~uwaɾ no~u paŋʦaħ ħananaj i, o~u paŋʦaħ a so~uwaɾ. ira ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw a paŋʦaħ i tajwan. taŋasa to~u i **** a miħʦaan i, ira to~u ko~u ****** a tamɬ~ɮaw so~umo~uwaɾaj to~u so~uwaɾ no~u paŋʦaħ i ħkaɾ maʔmin. finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ ** jo~u ħo~ufo~uʦ saħo~u kako~u, o~u matəŋiɾaj no~u mako~u a ŋiħa o~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina, aniniaj a wawa i, o~u so~uwaɾ naŋra maəmin to~u o~u no~u ħo~uɾam ko~u so~uwaɾ, ʦaaj to~u pisano~uʡamis to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina, saka, ɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ɾaħəɬ~ɮaw sato~u ko~u ʦaʦijaw no~u ʡamis. o~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis anini matija o~u mamaɾaħəɬ~ɮaw to~u, ano~u ʦaħo~u ka pisano~u ʡamis ko~u wawa ita i, o~u mamaɾaħəɬ~ɮaw to~u ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis, nawħani, to~uʡas to~uʡas sato~u ko~u mato~uʡasaj, o~u mamisiajaajaw aʦa to~unika mamaɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis. saka ira ko~u pinapina ko~u niħaratəŋan no~u mako~u to~u paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis. i kiwkaj miʦikəro~uħ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ******* matataħiʦ ato~u kiwkaj a paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u paranaʡan a pinanaman to~u so~uwaɾ iajaw i, tajni i tajwan mipatənakaj to~u so~uwaɾ no~u paŋʦaħ a mipatənakaj to~u jinʦo~umin, pakajni to~uni ro~uma a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u jinʦo~umin, ta ʦo~ujakən niŋra ko~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ a misano~u ʡamis, taħamatini, ʡaɾo~uman ħo~u ko~u i nijro~uʡaj a kiwkaj ira ħo~u ko~u no~u ʡamisaj a faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ. taɬ~ɮaɾiməɾa ko~u i nijaro~uʡaj a kiwkaj paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ, anini sato~u mafaɾiʦ to~u ko~u kasamiħəʦaan, ɾasawaɬ~ɮ ɾasawaɬ~ɮ sato~u ko~u maɾitəŋaj, o~u aniniaj sato~u a kaəmaŋaj, awa:aj to~u ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ naŋra a sapinananam to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis, maħapiŋan no~u mita ko~u anini ko~u kiwkaj, ʦa:aj to~u ka ʦaʦijaw to~u no~u paŋʦaħ a so~uwaɾ, saka to~u nanaj mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~uja mipatənakaj a fo~uksi, kaɾaɾo~uk a pasifanaʡ to~u so~uwaɾ, to~u marajraj ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u mita o~u paŋʦaħ. i kiwkaj i, o~u kasaso~uwaɾan no~u ʡamis to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis a kaitiraan, o~u saʡo~upo~u no~u kiwkaj maɾo~u kasaso~uwaɾan to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis. i kiwkaj i maŋaʡaj a maɾo~u pitəŋiɾan, kasaso~uwaɾan a kaitiraan. matija o~u pitəŋiɾ to~u kimaɬ~ɮ, pinanaman no~u wawa, kasaʡo~upo~uan no~u mato~uʡasaj, maəʔmin sa a misano~u ʡamis, ano~u misaʡo~usi to~u səsiw, minanam to~u raɬ~ɮiw, saʔħəto~u ħan misano~u ʡamis, ano~u samiħəʦamiħəʦa ħan a minanam, ʦaka to~uŋaɾ to~uŋaɾ sato~u ko~u fanaʡ a misano~u ʡamis. saka, maŋaʡaj a matataħiʦ to~u kiwkaj a minanam to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis. i ɾo~umaʡ a misatapaŋ a pasifanaʡ to~u so~uwaɾ ****** o~u nanaj no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ i, nanaj o~u pinanaman i ɾo~umaʡ ito~u, ʦaaj to~u ka ipapo~utaɾ, nawħani, aniniaj minanamaj to~una so~uwaɾ saħəto~u o~u kaʔmaŋaj a wawa, o~u pinanam i, ɬ~ɮəŋ aʦa i mitiɾiɬ~ɮan, taħira sato~u i ɾo~umaʡ o~uno~u kawpiŋ to~u ko~u so~uwaɾ naŋra, ano~u tajra ko~u siŋsi i paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ pasifanaʡ to~u so~uwaɾ i, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ maʔəmin minanam to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis, o~u ako~uŋ, o~u ama, o~u mama, o~u ina ato~u wawa, pakafanaʡən ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw, kaʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡ a paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ miparajraj to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis, o~u taɬ~ɮamanaj a ɬ~ɮəmakan ko~u nini , kaso~umo~uwaɾ to~u no~u ʡamis i ɾo~umaʡ ko~u nijaħ, paʡiʦəɾən ko~u wawa i ɾo~umaʡ ato~u i nijaro~uʡ a misano~u ʡamis. o~u pinanam to~u so~uwaɾ a kaitiraan.*** mafanaʡ kita to~u nika ratar no~u mawɾiʦo~u ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, misaiʦəɾ a mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u "pinanaman". ʦi faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ʦaŋra a paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u pinanam no~u wawa i ajaw no~u piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ i, misatapaŋ to~u a pasifanaʡ to~u so~uwaɾ naŋra, taɬ~ɮa makapaħ ko~u ħəʦi naŋra a pasifanaʡ to~u wawa. pakaj ni i ɾo~umaʡ ato~u jo~uʦiiŋ a miɾiajaw to~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan ko~u pasifanaʡ to~u wawa i, maɾaħəʦi to~u naŋra ko~u makapaħaj a pinanam. aniani i tajwan misaiʦəɾ to~u a mipatirəŋ to~u"pinanaman to~u so~uwaɾ a kaitiraan" maaraw no~u mita maɾaħəʦi to~u a mapaɾawaɬ~ɮ ko~una ɬ~ɮəmak. itini to~una pinanaman i, nanaj o~u pasifanaʡ to~u wawa maŋaʡaj ko~u mato~uʡasaj a minanam. o~u aniniaj a ina ato~u mama, ʦaaj to~u kaso~umo~uwaɾ to~u no~u ʡamis, pakaso~uʔɾin kita ano~u maɾaʦəʦaj ko~u pinanam no~u ina no~u mama ato~u wawa i, o~u wawa wawa to~u no~u mita, ano~u i ʦo~uwaʦo~uwa to~u, i pitiɾiɬ~ɮan to~u, i kiwkaj to~u, i ɾo~umaʡ maŋaʡaj to~u maʦaʦawi to~u mato~uʡasaj a misano~u ʡamis. o~u siŋsi ato~u minanamaj *** o~uno~u mato~uʡasaj a miʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, o~u siŋsi aʦa ato~u ʦəʦaj aʦa ko~u minanamaj, anʦa o~u masao~upaaj minanamaj, i ɾaɬ~ɮaj no~u ʡo~urip anʦa o~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u səraŋawan a minanm to~u so~uwaɾ no~u paŋʦaħ. o~u matiniaj a pinanam, maŋaʡaj patakaraw ko~u sapinanaman ato~u ʦiʡiʦəɾ ko~u minanamaj a mato~uʡasj, maŋaʡaj marajraj ko~u so~uwaɾ to~u fanaʡ ato~u taŋən. sakipapo~utaɾ pinanaman no~u kaʡəmaŋaj to~u so~uwaɾ ********* o~u papo~utaɾaj no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan ko~u niħaənan, tinako~u sjako~u, nijaro~uʡ, safəɾawan, kiwkaj, miɬ~ɮəmak to~u sakiso~uwaɾ no~u nijaħ pinanam ato~u pikiħatijaħ, maɾo~u sakaira no~u kaʡəmaŋaj kasasipiini ato~u minaman nijaħ a so~uwaɾ. matiniaj a pipaɾaɾan mato~uŋaɾ ko~u kafanaʡan no~u kaʡəmaŋaj minanam to~u so~uwaɾ, maʦikəro~uħ ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan ato~u sjakaj mikiħatija piʦo~ukəran. paħərək a so~uwaɾ ** paɾaʦəʦajən ko~u ɾo~umaʡ, nijaro~u, kiwkaj ato~u masamaanaj a kasao~upo~uan a maɾaʦəʦaj mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u amis, patirəŋən no~u mita ko~u pitəŋiɾan, kasaso~uwaɾan, pisao~usian, pitiɾiɬ~ɮan a kaitiraan. minanam to~u so~uwaɾ, ira aʦa kasaso~uwaɾan to~u so~uwaɾ, ano~u ʦaka so~umo~uwaɾ ʦaaj to~u kananam a ʦaʦijaw to~u no~u paŋʦaħ, maŋaɾəf ʦaaj katanəstəs ko~u so~uwaɾ.
